basic_details.job_title: BRIC NIAB Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: BRIC National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (BRIC NIAB)
basic_details.short_information: BRIC National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (BRIC NIAB) Project Associate-II Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website of BRIC National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (BRIC NIAB). A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BRIC NIAB Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MVSc. / M.Tech. / MSc. Degree in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Immunology with 2 years experience in R&D
qualification.details: MVSc. / M.Tech. / MSc. Degree in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Immunology with 2 years' experience in R&D in the related area. NET/GATE qualified will be preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BRIC NIAB Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BRIC NIAB Project Associate-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Associate-II position at BRIC NIAB is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MVSc., M.Tech., or MSc. Degree in Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Microbiology, or Immunology, along with at least 2 years of relevant R&D experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-II post is 35 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the summary, so refer to the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-II role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Project Associate-II position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves multiple stages, including screening of applications, an online interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. You will need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job. The recruitment is for a Project Associate-II position on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is BRIC NIAB located?
faq.answer: BRIC National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (BRIC NIAB) is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500032.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
